label: Persistent Slab — PWL Loading     (Mar 8, cold/clear then storm)
description: A 12-day cold clear period (-15 to -22°C at ridge) builds a deep faceted weak layer. A subsequent storm deposits 32 cm of new snow directly onto the PWL. The system identifies persistent slab conditions and maintains HIGH hazard even after the storm ends — illustrating why PWL problems persist for weeks.
